description: Multi-taxa genus and family taxonomy with bidirectional species lookup
source: eBird API v2 (birds) + GBIF Backbone Taxonomy (non-bird taxa)
license: Derived from eBird data - Non-commercial use with attribution
attribution: Bird taxonomy: Cornell Lab of Ornithology (eBird/Clements Checklist). Non-bird taxonomy: GBIF Backbone Taxonomy (CC0). https://doi.org/10.15468/39omei
